exercises.code:
# agentic_F2-explorer/S09-T3-A-E2: packet-only solve (no prior lives)
# Fixture del paquete (conserva datos; no reescribas asserts)
import logging, io
buf = io.StringIO()
log = logging.getLogger("familiarity.ingest")
log.handlers.clear()
log.setLevel(logging.INFO)
h = logging.StreamHandler(buf)
h.setFormatter(logging.Formatter("%(levelname)s %(message)s"))
log.addHandler(h)
log.propagate = False
log.info("stage=ingest event=start")
# forma esperada (referencia): print(buf.getvalue().strip())

).hexdigest()[:12]

selfcheck.chosen_text: Encadenar la causa en __cause__ sin perder contexto
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [agentic_F2/Explorer] S09 q0: `raise New from e` llena __cause__ y preserva el traceback original.
[agentic_F2/Explorer] S09 q1: delimiter vacío en config es error de job, no de fila: fail-fast.
[agentic_F2/Explorer] S09 q2: CLI limpia: stdout = datos; logs/diagnóstico a stderr.
[agentic_F2/Explorer] S09 q3: mask_email enmascara local-part; no loguear email completo ni hashes de password.

selfcheck.chosen_text: Puede reintentarse con backoff; ValueError de datos no
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [agentic_F2/Explorer] S09 q4: TimeoutError es transitorio (retry+backoff); ValueError de datos no se reintenta ciego.

selfcheck.chosen_text: La entrada más pequeña que reproduce el bug
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [agentic_F2/Explorer] S09 q5: minimal repro = entrada mínima que reproduce; no todo el CSV de prod.
